title: coreopsis pulchra
intro: Coreopsis pulchra, also known as the pink coreopsis or pink tickseed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis pulchra include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
